gates.name: Provider execution
gates.message: 11 provider routes executed; required routes include query-plan deep crawl, Claude Code, GLM, Hermes DeepSeek, MiniMax, Antigravity, Codex and local guard; missing standard routes: none.

gates.name: MiniMax dual route
gates.message: MiniMax A/B highspeed routes must both be recorded.

gates.name: Antigravity Code Assist route
gates.message: Antigravity authenticated Code Assist route must be recorded or explain missing local auth.

gates.name: GLM route
gates.message: GLM/Zhipu direct route must be recorded or explain missing auth.

gates.name: Xortron local guard
gates.message: Local Xortron/Ollama route checks verified-evidence synthesis.

gates.name: Source URL depth
gates.message: 106 source URLs extracted from provider outputs.

gates.name: Source envelope readiness
gates.message: Each candidate finding has source URLs and claim level fields.

gates.name: Official claim gate
gates.message: Finance/ownership/UBO claims stay gated unless primary/provider proof is attached.

gates.name: Public error hygiene
gates.message: Raw provider errors must not flow to public HTML.

public_report_rule: Only source-backed, claim-level-labelled findings may enter public HTML; provider diagnostics remain internal artifacts.
